title: Tennessee
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Tennessee

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Tennessee

You can apply for Medicaid in Tennessee by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Tennessee

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Tennessee

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Tennessee

CHIP in Tennessee

TennCare covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for TennCare right now. . Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about TennCare in Tennessee.
